name: Cherry Hill, New Jersey

rent.notes: New Jersey has no residential rental tax. Water, sewage, and trash are separate utility bills (not included in rent).
rent.gigInternetNotes: 94.7% fiber availability in Cherry Hill per BroadbandNow. Fios is near-universal; essentially no premium for gig-capable rentals.

groceries.notes: 2 adults + pet food; no sales tax on groceries in NJ

electricity.notes: PSE&G/JCP&L. Moderate A/C needs; electric heat supplement.

gas.notes: PSE&G. Natural gas primary heat (cold NJ winters), cooking, water heater.

sewage.notes: Camden County MUA. Billed separately or with water.

trash.notes: Township municipal collection. Some areas included in property tax.

utilities.taxes: New Jersey exempts residential utilities from sales tax.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig).

healthcare.notes: Medicare Part B ($174.70/mo) + Medigap Plan G (~$200/mo x2 people) + Part D (~$45/mo x2) + dental/vision plans. Higher premiums reflect macular degeneration specialist coverage and frequent monitoring needs.

petCare.notes: Vet visits, vaccinations, flea/tick, pet insurance

petDaycare.notes: Doggy daycare 2 days/week, large breed rate (~$43/day). Camp Bow Wow Maple Shade, Dogtopia Cherry Hill. South Jersey pricing.

petGrooming.notes: Bernese coat maintenance, professional grooming monthly

transportation.notes: Car-dependent suburb; PATCO to Philly available

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

clothing.notes: No sales tax on clothing in NJ

phoneCell.notes: T-Mobile 55+ Essentials. 2 phones, 1.5GB+ high-speed data each, all taxes included.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: Anti-VEGF injections for macular degeneration (~$300-400 OOP each, 6-10x/yr after Medicare 80%). Specialist visits: ophthalmologist q6-8wks, endocrinologist 2-4x/yr, cardiologist 1-2x/yr. Frequent labs: lipid panel, TSH, A1C, CMP 3-4x/yr each. Both adults: PCP visits quarterly.

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: SS exempt. Retirement income exclusion up to $100K for couples (income <$150K).

pros: Quiet suburb with access to Philly via PATCO
NJ exempts SS from state tax
No sales tax on groceries or clothing
cons: Higher NJ state income tax rates
Higher property insurance than some areas
NJ cost of living above national average
